title: pogostemon rogersii
intro: Pogostemon rogersii, also known as Java patchouli or patchouli, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Indonesia and Malaysia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Pogostemon rogersii include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Pogostemon rogersii include essential oil, extracts, and infusions, often used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and traditional medicine.
